This incident occurred at a time when we were having a meeting with you on the financial return on diamond sales in areas controlled by the Democratic Republic of the Congo. The troops of the Democratic Republic of the Congo and their foreign allies, Angola and Zimbabwe, have received $100 million the day before, cash in three diplomatic boxes via ZIMBABWE. I am writing to ask for your assistance as a cover fund, and also cooperate to transfer the amount to your bank account ($25 million). Only $25 million, I deposited with a security company in Ghana. ($25 million) is part of the diamond trade, originally for the late President Laurent Kabiyra and shipped in diplomatic boxes through Zimbabwe. These boxes were kept by me before the SAD incident that took the life of the president. After the assassinations and sporadic shootings between factions, and the chaos that followed, I had to flee the country for my precious life, because I was not a soldier, but a civil servant. From there I crossed the Congo River to the other side of Libreville in the Congo, where I moved to Ghana, a third country, where I now took refuge. As your help, when the money goes to your account, I will give you 20% of the total amount as your own share, and 75% will be given to me. With your kind advice, I hope to invest in profitable enterprises in your country. Settle down and live a meaningful life in other countries, because I am tired of living in a war environment. The remaining 5% will be used to offset any expenses incurred by transferring money to your account. If your proposal is acceptable, please contact ME immediately via the above phone and email so that ME can schedule a face-to-face meeting with you in Ghana, as seen and believed before transferring funds to your bank account. Last but not least, it is important for you to understand that this money is not at any risk, because there is no record of the money in Kinshasa, because it is for personal use (Mr. President) before the evil incident, and I also have all the necessary documents about the money, including (certificate of deposit), because I am a depositor of CONSIGNMENT.LOKING.

text: 2. 亲爱的朋友，我是本·苏尔曼先生，是一名海关官员，在尼日利亚拉各斯-尼日利亚伊凯亚的穆尔塔拉·穆罕默德国际机场工作，是联邦内政部海关部门的助理管制员。尼日利亚前国家元首桑尼·阿巴查将军于1998年6月8日突然去世，他的助手和直系亲属在试图乘坐一架载有6个标有“外交行李”的后备箱从尼日利亚逃往沙特阿拉伯的包机上被捕。在他们试图登上飞机时，我的官员们接到线报，对飞机进行了彻底的搜查，发现6个后备箱里装着总计197,570,000.00美元(1亿9757万美元)的外币。我只向政府申报了5个箱子，并扣留了我保管的1个箱子，里面只有3,000万美元，这是为了防止他们在运输过程中被发现。由于几家媒体报道了这位已故国家元首和他的联合政府官员于1999年7月2日从我国国库窃取了总计550亿美元的全部资金(参考：ngrGuardianNews.com)。就连1998年7月的《伦敦泰晤士报》也报道说，阿巴查将军在海外的一个账户里有超过30亿美元。我们决定把这个盒子藏起来，直到局势平静下来，在这个问题上平静下来。因此，这个盒子被存放在尼日利亚的一家保安公司，并在其他地方贴上了“宝石和珠宝”的标签，里面的东西不会被发现。现在一切都平静了，我们(我和我在行动小组的两名同事)现在准备通过外交安排将这个箱子运出这个国家，这是最安全的方式。然而，作为政府官员，公务员行为准则不允许我们经营任何外国账户或拥有外国投资，我们账户中的金额不能超过我们的平均工资，因此我们的残疾，我们需要您的帮助来帮助收集并安全地保存在您的账户中。因此，我们希望您帮助我们将这笔钱转移出尼日利亚。我们一定会对你的帮助给予丰厚的补偿。为此，我们可以指示尼日利亚的安保公司通过外交途径将货物转移到他们在尼日利亚境外的分支机构，这批货物将被称为“贵重宝石和珠宝”，是您在访问尼日利亚期间购买的，将从这里转移到贵国进行安全保管。然后我们可以安排在目的地国家见面提货。此后，您将在那里开一个帐户，把钱存入那里，然后逐步指示汇款到贵国。这项业务对您来说是100%无风险的，因此请对此事高度保密。如果您表示有兴趣协助我们，请发电子邮件给我，以了解我们计划如何执行交易的更多说明。期待您的回复。致以最良好的祝愿，本·苏尔曼先生
text_translated: 2. Dear friends, I am Mr Ben Surman, a customs officer working at the Murtala Mohammed International Airport in Lagos, Nigeria-Ikea, Nigeria, and an assistant controller in the Customs Department of the Federal Ministry of the Interior. General Sonny Abacha, former head of state of Nigeria, died suddenly on June 8, 1998. His aides and immediate family were arrested on a chartered plane trying to escape from Nigeria to Saudi Arabia carrying six trunks marked "Diplomatic Baggage." As they tried to board the plane, my officials received a tip and conducted a thorough search of the plane and found six trunks containing a total of US$197,570,000.00 (US$197.57 million) in foreign currency. I only declared five boxes to the government and detained one box in my custody, which contained only $30 million, to prevent them from being discovered during transportation. As several media reported that the late head of state and his coalition government officials stole all funds totaling US$55 billion from our national treasury on July 2, 1999 (reference: ngrGuardianNews.com). Even the Times of London in July 1998 reported that General Abacha had more than $3 billion in an overseas account. We decided to hide the box until the situation calmed down and calm down on this issue. As a result, the box was stored at a security company in Nigeria and labeled "gems and jewelry" elsewhere, so that the contents would not be discovered. Everything is calm now, and we (my two colleagues in the Action Group and I) are now ready to move the box out of the country through diplomatic arrangements, which is the safest way. However, as government officials, the Civil Servant Code of Conduct does not allow us to operate any foreign accounts or have foreign investments, and the amount in our accounts cannot exceed our average salary, so we have a disability and we need your help to help collect and safely store it in your account. So we want you to help us move this money out of Nigeria. We will definitely compensate you generously for your help. To this end, we can instruct security companies in Nigeria to transfer the goods through diplomatic channels to their branches outside Nigeria. These goods will be called "precious gems and jewelry" and will be purchased during your visit to Nigeria and will be transferred from here to your country for safe custody. Then we can arrange to meet and pick up the goods in the destination country. After that, you will open an account there, deposit the money there, and then gradually direct the transfer of money to your country. This business is 100% risk-free for you, so please keep this matter highly confidential. If you have expressed interest in assisting us, please email me with more instructions on how we plan to execute the transaction. Looking forward to hearing from you. Best wishes, Mr. Ben Surman
Body: 2. 亲爱的朋友，我是本·苏尔曼先生，是一名海关官员，在尼日利亚拉各斯-尼日利亚伊凯亚的穆尔塔拉·穆罕默德国际机场工作，是联邦内政部海关部门的助理管制员。尼日利亚前国家元首桑尼·阿巴查将军于1998年6月8日突然去世，他的助手和直系亲属在试图乘坐一架载有6个标有“外交行李”的后备箱从尼日利亚逃往沙特阿拉伯的包机上被捕。在他们试图登上飞机时，我的官员们接到线报，对飞机进行了彻底的搜查，发现6个后备箱里装着总计197,570,000.00美元(1亿9757万美元)的外币。我只向政府申报了5个箱子，并扣留了我保管的1个箱子，里面只有3,000万美元，这是为了防止他们在运输过程中被发现。由于几家媒体报道了这位已故国家元首和他的联合政府官员于1999年7月2日从我国国库窃取了总计550亿美元的全部资金(参考：ngrGuardianNews.com)。就连1998年7月的《伦敦泰晤士报》也报道说，阿巴查将军在海外的一个账户里有超过30亿美元。我们决定把这个盒子藏起来，直到局势平静下来，在这个问题上平静下来。因此，这个盒子被存放在尼日利亚的一家保安公司，并在其他地方贴上了“宝石和珠宝”的标签，里面的东西不会被发现。现在一切都平静了，我们(我和我在行动小组的两名同事)现在准备通过外交安排将这个箱子运出这个国家，这是最安全的方式。然而，作为政府官员，公务员行为准则不允许我们经营任何外国账户或拥有外国投资，我们账户中的金额不能超过我们的平均工资，因此我们的残疾，我们需要您的帮助来帮助收集并安全地保存在您的账户中。因此，我们希望您帮助我们将这笔钱转移出尼日利亚。我们一定会对你的帮助给予丰厚的补偿。为此，我们可以指示尼日利亚的安保公司通过外交途径将货物转移到他们在尼日利亚境外的分支机构，这批货物将被称为“贵重宝石和珠宝”，是您在访问尼日利亚期间购买的，将从这里转移到贵国进行安全保管。然后我们可以安排在目的地国家见面提货。此后，您将在那里开一个帐户，把钱存入那里，然后逐步指示汇款到贵国。这项业务对您来说是100%无风险的，因此请对此事高度保密。如果您表示有兴趣协助我们，请发电子邮件给我，以了解我们计划如何执行交易的更多说明。期待您的回复。致以最良好的祝愿，本·苏尔曼先生

text_translated: 2. Dear friends, I am Mr Ben Surman, a customs officer working at the Murtala Mohammed International Airport in Lagos, Nigeria-Ikea, Nigeria, and an assistant controller in the Customs Department of the Federal Ministry of the Interior. General Sonny Abacha, former head of state of Nigeria, died suddenly on June 8, 1998. His aides and immediate family were arrested on a chartered plane trying to escape from Nigeria to Saudi Arabia carrying six trunks marked "Diplomatic Baggage." As they tried to board the plane, my officials received a tip and conducted a thorough search of the plane and found six trunks containing a total of US$197,570,000.00 (US$197.57 million) in foreign currency. I only declared five boxes to the government and detained one box in my custody, which contained only $30 million, to prevent them from being discovered during transportation. As several media reported that the late head of state and his coalition government officials stole all funds totaling US$55 billion from our national treasury on July 2, 1999 (reference: ngrGuardianNews.com). Even the Times of London in July 1998 reported that General Abacha had more than $3 billion in an overseas account. We decided to hide the box until the situation calmed down and calm down on this issue. As a result, the box was stored at a security company in Nigeria and labeled "gems and jewelry" elsewhere, so that the contents would not be discovered. Everything is calm now, and we (my two colleagues in the Action Group and I) are now ready to move the box out of the country through diplomatic arrangements, which is the safest way. However, as government officials, the Civil Servant Code of Conduct does not allow us to operate any foreign accounts or have foreign investments, and the amount in our accounts cannot exceed our average salary, so we have a disability and we need your help to help collect and safely store it in your account. So we want you to help us move this money out of Nigeria. We will definitely compensate you generously for your help. To this end, we can instruct security companies in Nigeria to transfer the goods through diplomatic channels to their branches outside Nigeria. These goods will be called "precious gems and jewelry" and will be purchased during your visit to Nigeria and will be transferred from here to your country for safe custody. Then we can arrange to meet and pick up the goods in the destination country. After that, you will open an account there, deposit the money there, and then gradually direct the transfer of money to your country. This business is 100% risk-free for you, so please keep this matter highly confidential. If you have expressed interest in assisting us, please email me with more instructions on how we plan to execute the transaction. Looking forward to hearing from you. Best wishes, Mr. Ben Surman

text: 5. 尊敬的先生，我怀着满怀希望的心情写信，就以下内容寻求您的帮助。我是玛丽亚姆·阿巴查夫人，尼日利亚前国家军事首脑萨尼·阿巴查将军的前第一夫人，他于1998年6月8日在位时因心脏骤停(心脏病发作)猝死。我毫不怀疑你有能力和善意帮助我(为安全起见)接受我已故丈夫在一家证券和存款公司以我为受益人的2500万美元遗嘱的保管。虽然我与你的联系并不是基于任何个人建议，但我恳请你的理解、善意和真诚的帮助，以真诚的意图和关切回应这一信息。这笔钱目前存放在一家保安公司，作为待收的杂款，并且根据我已故丈夫在缴存时与保安公司在缴存时签订的协议；收款中心在加纳。按照法律规定，我已故丈夫的财产是在家族律师托尼·穆萨的授权下管理的。据2000年3月13日的《伦敦新闻周刊》报道，亲爱的JK，自从我丈夫去世以来，现政权一直在调查我已故丈夫的财富和财产。由代表尼日利亚政府的律师Enrico Monfrini领导的调查小组到目前为止已经提交了他们的报告，目前，一些流动的现金和资产，无论是动产还是不动产，都在当地和国际上被冻结和扣押，我最后的希望寄托在你保管的这笔资金的直接安全上。此外，为辛普森辩护的律师约翰尼·科克伦(Johnnie Cochran)已被阿巴查的随行人员请来，帮助他们保留有争议的资金。幸运的是，我们的家庭律师秘密保护了我丈夫的个人遗嘱，使其不被调查人员注意到，并严格建议立即将遗嘱资金紧急转移到值得信赖的外国家庭朋友的海外账户。出于安全原因和其他建议，！没有亲属关系，否则！应该使用我们的朋友；因为这是一种安全措施。早些时候，政府对我们所有的家庭成员实施了海外旅行禁令，并没收了我们商业帝国所有已知的当地和国际机构。情况如此糟糕，以至于我们几乎是在好心人的帮助下生活。鉴于这种困境，我希望你足够值得信赖和善良，响应这个求救电话，把我和我的孩子们从绝望的未来中拯救出来。我在此同意对你的真诚和坦率的努力给予极大的补偿，这将在你、律师和我之间进行讨论。在你立即做出回应后，律师将前往加纳，在那里你们两人将会面，然后前往存款公司进行索赔。最重要的是，这些文件包括授权书和存款证等。这些文件将通过传真发送给您，因为您必须提交它们才能获得适当的索赔。请放心，这笔交易是完全安全和合法的，但即使在资金被我们保管之后，也必须严格保密。这是因为任何信息泄露都可能毁掉整个交易。请所有联系人必须通过我的律师在他的电子邮件：tony_m@lawyer.com，这必须这样做，因为他已被授权处理这件事，我已经向他(我的律师)充分介绍了我与您的联系。由于我目前的情况，我已将一切交给他与您协调和敲定，必要时我会与您沟通。为了这笔交易的安全，请回复您的电话和传真号码，使他们能够直接联系您，而不会冒着邮件被截取的风险。我期待着您的快速回复。最好的祝愿，玛丽亚姆·阿巴查夫人
text_translated: 5. Dear sir, I am writing with hope to seek your help on the following. I am Mrs. Mariam Abacha, the former first lady of the former head of State military of Nigeria, General Thani Abacha, who died of sudden cardiac arrest (heart attack) while he was in office on 8 June 1998. I have no doubt that you have the ability and kindness to help me (for the sake of safety) to accept the custody of my late husband's $25 million will in favor of me in a securities and deposit company. Although my contact with you is not based on any personal advice, I implore your understanding, goodwill and sincere help to respond to this message with sincere intentions and concerns. The money is currently deposited in a security company as miscellaneous money to be collected and in accordance with the agreement signed between my late husband and the security company at the time of deposit; the collection centre is in Ghana. According to the law, my late husband's property was managed under the authority of Tony Musa, a family lawyer. According to the London Newsweek on March 13, 2000, dear JK, since my husband's death, the regime has been investigating my late husband's wealth and wealth. The investigation team led by Enrico Monfrini, a lawyer representing the Nigerian government, has so far submitted their report, and at present, some cash and assets, whether movable or immovable, have been frozen and seized locally and internationally, and my last hope lies in the direct security of the funds in your custody. In addition, Johnnie Cochran, the lawyer who defended Simpson, has been called in by Abacha's entourage to help them retain the controversial funds. Fortunately, our family lawyer secretly protected my husband's personal will from investigators and strictly recommended the immediate emergency transfer of testament funds to the overseas accounts of trusted foreign family friends. For security reasons and other suggestions! No kinship, otherwise! Our friends should be used; because it is a safety measure. Earlier, the government imposed an overseas travel ban on all our family members and confiscated all known local and international institutions in our business empire. The situation is so bad that we almost live with the help of kind-hearted people. In view of this predicament, I hope you are trustworthy and kind enough to respond to this distress call and save me and my children from a desperate future. I hereby agree to greatly compensate you for your sincere and frank efforts, which will be discussed between you, the lawyer and me. After your immediate response, the lawyer will go to Ghana, where the two of you will meet, and then go to the deposit company to file a claim. Most importantly, these documents include authorizations and certificates of deposit. These documents will be sent to you by fax because you must submit them in order to obtain the appropriate claim. Please rest assured that the transaction is completely safe and legal, but even after the funds are in our custody, they must be kept strictly confidential. This is because any disclosure of information could ruin the whole deal. Please all contacts must be through my lawyer in his email: tony_m@lawyer.com, this must be done, as he has been authorized to handle this matter, I have fully introduced to him (my lawyer) my contact with you. Due to my current situation, I have left everything to him to coordinate and finalize with you, and I will communicate with you if necessary. For the security of this transaction, please reply to your phone and fax number so that they can contact you directly without risking the interception of your email. I look forward to your quick reply. Best wishes, Mrs. Mariam Abacha.

text: 5. 尊敬的先生，我怀着满怀希望的心情写信，就以下内容寻求您的帮助。我是玛丽亚姆·阿巴查夫人，尼日利亚前国家军事首脑萨尼·阿巴查将军的前第一夫人，他于1998年6月8日在位时因心脏骤停(心脏病发作)猝死。我毫不怀疑你有能力和善意帮助我(为安全起见)接受我已故丈夫在一家证券和存款公司以我为受益人的2500万美元遗嘱的保管。虽然我与你的联系并不是基于任何个人建议，但我恳请你的理解、善意和真诚的帮助，以真诚的意图和关切回应这一信息。这笔钱目前存放在一家保安公司，作为待收的杂款，并且根据我已故丈夫在缴存时与保安公司在缴存时签订的协议；收款中心在加纳。按照法律规定，我已故丈夫的财产是在家族律师托尼·穆萨的授权下管理的。据2000年3月13日的《伦敦新闻周刊》报道，亲爱的JK，自从我丈夫去世以来，现政权一直在调查我已故丈夫的财富和财产。由代表尼日利亚政府的律师Enrico Monfrini领导的调查小组到目前为止已经提交了他们的报告，目前，一些流动的现金和资产，无论是动产还是不动产，都在当地和国际上被冻结和扣押，我最后的希望寄托在你保管的这笔资金的直接安全上。此外，为辛普森辩护的律师约翰尼·科克伦(Johnnie Cochran)已被阿巴查的随行人员请来，帮助他们保留有争议的资金。幸运的是，我们的家庭律师秘密保护了我丈夫的个人遗嘱，使其不被调查人员注意到，并严格建议立即将遗嘱资金紧急转移到值得信赖的外国家庭朋友的海外账户。出于安全原因和其他建议，！没有亲属关系，否则！应该使用我们的朋友；因为这是一种安全措施。早些时候，政府对我们所有的家庭成员实施了海外旅行禁令，并没收了我们商业帝国所有已知的当地和国际机构。情况如此糟糕，以至于我们几乎是在好心人的帮助下生活。鉴于这种困境，我希望你足够值得信赖和善良，响应这个求救电话，把我和我的孩子们从绝望的未来中拯救出来。我在此同意对你的真诚和坦率的努力给予极大的补偿，这将在你、律师和我之间进行讨论。在你立即做出回应后，律师将前往加纳，在那里你们两人将会面，然后前往存款公司进行索赔。最重要的是，这些文件包括授权书和存款证等。这些文件将通过传真发送给您，因为您必须提交它们才能获得适当的索赔。请放心，这笔交易是完全安全和合法的，但即使在资金被我们保管之后，也必须严格保密。这是因为任何信息泄露都可能毁掉整个交易。请所有联系人必须通过我的律师在他的电子邮件：tony_m@lawyer.com，这必须这样做，因为他已被授权处理这件事，我已经向他(我的律师)充分介绍了我与您的联系。由于我目前的情况，我已将一切交给他与您协调和敲定，必要时我会与您沟通。为了这笔交易的安全，请回复您的电话和传真号码，使他们能够直接联系您，而不会冒着邮件被截取的风险。我期待着您的快速回复。最好的祝愿，玛丽亚姆·阿巴查夫人
text_translated: 5. Dear sir, I am writing with hope to seek your help on the following. I am Mrs. Mariam Abacha, the former first lady of the former head of State military of Nigeria, General Thani Abacha, who died of sudden cardiac arrest (heart attack) while he was in office on 8 June 1998. I have no doubt that you have the ability and kindness to help me (for the sake of safety) to accept the custody of my late husband's $25 million will in favor of me in a securities and deposit company. Although my contact with you is not based on any personal advice, I implore your understanding, goodwill and sincere help to respond to this message with sincere intentions and concerns. The money is currently deposited in a security company as miscellaneous money to be collected and in accordance with the agreement signed between my late husband and the security company at the time of deposit; the collection centre is in Ghana. According to the law, my late husband's property was managed under the authority of Tony Musa, a family lawyer. According to the London Newsweek on March 13, 2000, dear JK, since my husband's death, the regime has been investigating my late husband's wealth and wealth. The investigation team led by Enrico Monfrini, a lawyer representing the Nigerian government, has so far submitted their report, and at present, some cash and assets, whether movable or immovable, have been frozen and seized locally and internationally, and my last hope lies in the direct security of the funds in your custody. In addition, Johnnie Cochran, the lawyer who defended Simpson, has been called in by Abacha's entourage to help them retain the controversial funds. Fortunately, our family lawyer secretly protected my husband's personal will from investigators and strictly recommended the immediate emergency transfer of testament funds to the overseas accounts of trusted foreign family friends. For security reasons and other suggestions! No kinship, otherwise! Our friends should be used; because it is a safety measure. Earlier, the government imposed an overseas travel ban on all our family members and confiscated all known local and international institutions in our business empire. The situation is so bad that we almost live with the help of kind-hearted people. In view of this predicament, I hope you are trustworthy and kind enough to respond to this distress call and save me and my children from a desperate future. I hereby agree to greatly compensate you for your sincere and frank efforts, which will be discussed between you, the lawyer and me. After your immediate response, the lawyer will go to Ghana, where the two of you will meet, and then go to the deposit company to file a claim. Most importantly, these documents include authorizations and certificates of deposit. These documents will be sent to you by fax because you must submit them in order to obtain the appropriate claim. Please rest assured that the transaction is completely safe and legal, but even after the funds are in our custody, they must be kept strictly confidential. This is because any disclosure of information could ruin the whole deal. Please all contacts must be through my lawyer in his email: tony_m@lawyer.com, this must be done, as he has been authorized to handle this matter, I have fully introduced to him (my lawyer) my contact with you. Due to my current situation, I have left everything to him to coordinate and finalize with you, and I will communicate with you if necessary. For the security of this transaction, please reply to your phone and fax number so that they can contact you directly without risking the interception of your email. I look forward to your quick reply. Best wishes, Mrs. Mariam Abacha.

text: 6. 注意：总裁/常务董事尊敬的先生/女士，请求紧急业务关系我们是尼日利亚联邦政府合同审查小组的高级官员，他们有兴趣将货物进口到我国，并利用目前困在尼日利亚的资金在海外投资。为了开展这项业务，我们请求您的帮助、知识和专业知识，使我们能够在国外收到上述被困资金，以便随后购买和盘点将要进口的货物，并在国外投资。这笔资金的来源如下：在我国以前的军事政权中，政府官员成立公司并授予自己合同，这些合同在各部委严重高开发票。新的文官政府现在成立了一个合同审查小组，我和我的同事都是成员，我们发现了很多虚增的金额，由于我们是公务员和这个小组的成员，我们不能以我们的名义获得这笔钱。因此，我的小组同事委托我寻找一位海外合作伙伴，将31000 000 000美元(3100万美元)的款项电汇到该合作伙伴的账户。因此，我们给你写了这封信。我们同意分享这笔钱：1.70%给我们(官员)2.20%给外国赞助人(你)3.10%用于结算税收和当地和外国费用。我们希望开展进口业务和对外投资的就是这70%。请注意，这笔交易是100%安全的，我们希望资金可以在收到以下信息之日起十(10)个银行日内到达您的账户。一个合适的公司名称和银行账户(公司或个人)可以支付资金。以上信息将使我们能够分别写求职信和工作描述。这样，我们将使用贵公司的名称申请付款，并将合同重新授予贵公司的名称。我们期待着与你方做生意，并恳请你方对这笔交易保密。请使用此电子邮件地址确认收到这封信。邮箱：davidkuta2002@yahoo.com，等待您的紧急回复。注：所有信件应保密。致以最诚挚的问候，大卫·库塔
text_translated: 6. NOTE: President/Managing Director Dear Mr./Madam, Request for urgent business relations We are senior officials of the Nigeria Federal Government Contract Review Team who are interested in importing goods into our country and using the funds currently trapped in Nigeria to invest overseas. In order to carry out this business, we ask for your help, knowledge and expertise to enable us to receive the above-mentioned trapped funds abroad in order to subsequently purchase and inventory the goods to be imported and invest abroad. The sources of this funding are as follows: In our country's previous military regimes, government officials formed companies and awarded themselves contracts that were severely overinvoiced in various ministries. The new civilian government has now established a contract review group, of which my colleagues and I are members, and we have found a lot of inflated amounts, and since we are civil servants and members of this group, we cannot get this money in our name. So, my team colleagues entrusted me to find an overseas partner and wire $31,000,000 (US$31 million) to the partner's account. Therefore, we have written you this letter. We agreed to share the money: 1.70% to us (officials)2.20% to foreign sponsors (you)3.10% to settle taxes and local and foreign fees. It is this 70% that we hope to carry out import business and foreign investment. Please note that this transaction is 100% secure and we expect funds to reach your account within ten (10) bank days from the date of receiving the following information. An appropriate company name and bank account (company or individual) can pay funds. The above information will allow us to write a cover letter and a job description separately. In this way, we will apply for payment using your company's name and re-award the contract to your company's name. We look forward to doing business with you and ask you to keep this transaction confidential. Please use this email address to confirm receipt of this letter. Email: davidkuta2002@yahoo.com, waiting for your urgent reply. Note: All letters should be confidential. My most sincere greetings, David Kuta

text: 8. 联系电话：233-24-204567。在寻找外国合作伙伴协助我的业务时，我通过一个可靠的来源获得了你的联系。我是威廉·德拉洛，在塞拉利昂共和国前国家军事首脑科罗马少校执政期间，他是已故矿业和自然资源部长的儿子，在争取恢复他的权力的斗争中，他被蒂贾尼·卡巴总统的军队屠杀。由于我父亲的死亡情况，我和我的兄弟在加纳阿克拉成为难民。几个月前，在我父亲去世之前，他向我透露了他在加纳这里的一家保安公司存放的一些金钱和黄金。总共有28.300000美元，还有200公斤重的22克拉的黄金，放在加纳的一个保险库里。关于这批货物的文件是我父亲生前移交给我的，我仔细寻找并找到了保安公司，我确认这批货物存放在他们在阿富汗的保险库里。这些东西是作为一个家庭的贵重物品存放的，凭借我已故父亲的儿子的权利，保安公司已同意如实发放这批货物。我请求您的协助，因为我父亲已向保安公司声明，由于他在政府中的职务，他的外国合伙人将被授权对这批货物提出索赔。为此，我请求他的受益人以您的外国合伙人的名义提出这批货物的索赔。作为你的帮助，我准备给你总金额的10%。这是一笔无风险的交易，因为我父亲将这笔贵重物品作为个人财产存入。在这种情况下，每一次完全转移这一贵重物品的过程可能不会超过(7)个工作日，如果您的合作协助是可行的。请包括您的电话和传真号码以便于沟通我将非常感谢您的消息，所有与此有关的文件都完好无损，请尽快通过电子邮件地址swilliam22drallo@yahoo.com或william2244@maktoob.comBEST REGDS William Drallo联系我
text_translated: 8. Contact number: 233-24-204567. While looking for foreign partners to assist in my business, I got your contact through a reliable source. I am William Delalo, during the administration of Major Koroma, former National Military Head of the Republic of Sierra Leone, he was the son of the late Minister of Mines and Natural Resources, who was massacred by the troops of President Tijani Kabbah during the struggle to restore his power. Due to the circumstances of my father's death, my brother and I became refugees in Accra, Ghana. A few months ago, before my father passed away, he revealed to me some money and gold he had stored at a security company here in Ghana. A total of US$28.3 million, as well as 200 kilograms of 22-carat gold, was kept in a vault in Ghana. The documents about the goods were handed over to me by my father during his lifetime. I searched carefully and found the security company. I confirmed that the goods were stored in their vault in Afghanistan. These items were stored as valuables for a family, and by virtue of the rights of my late father's son, the security company has agreed to issue the goods truthfully. I ask for your assistance because my father has stated to the security company that due to his position in the government, his foreign partners will be authorized to file claims against the goods. To this end, I ask his beneficiary to file a claim for the goods in the name of your foreign partner. As your help, I am prepared to give you 10% of the total amount. It was a risk-free transaction because my father deposited the valuables as personal property. In this case, each complete transfer of this valuable item may not exceed (7) business days, if your cooperative assistance is feasible. Please include your phone and fax numbers for ease of communication. I will appreciate your message very much and all documents related to this are intact. Please contact me as soon as possible via email at swilam22drallo@yahoo.com or william2244@maktoob.comBEST REGDS William Drallo

Body: 16. Hello, dear sir, I am Mrs. Mariam Abacha. I got in touch with you from a close colleague of mine who works with the Chamber of Commerce and Industry of Nigeria. He visited your country for an international trade fair because I wanted to find a trustworthy and reliable foreign businessman or company. After the sudden death in 1998 of my husband, the late General Sani Abacha, former head of state of Nigeria, I was placed in a state of extreme confusion, frustration and despair by the current civilian government, and I was tortured physically and mentally by the country's security personnel. As a deeply traumatized widow, I have lost faith in anyone in this country. You must have heard reports from the media and on the Internet about the recovery of various huge amounts of money my husband had deposited in different securities companies abroad, some of which willingly leaked their secrets, revealing the money we confidently kept there, or a lot of outright extortion. In fact, the total amount discovered by the government so far is about 700 yuan. Millions of dollars. They will not be soft and make me poor for the rest of my life. Once you reply, I will give you more information on this. I have a lot of confidence in you, so I cannot visit the embassy due to the security network in my daily affairs, so I decided to contact you and hope you will not betray the trust I have placed in you. I have deposited US$35 million in a foreign security company whose name will not be disclosed until we open communications. I would appreciate it if you could deposit this funds into your account for safekeeping. You and my family lawyers are aware of this arrangement and they will deal directly with you because I am still under house arrest at home. I'm seriously thinking that once the funds go into your account, I can settle abroad so that I can start over if you want, but if possible, just help me transfer the funds to your bank account and you'll get 20% of the funds. text_translated: 17. From: Dr. Anayo Awka (Union Bank of Nigeria)Marina Lagos Note: President/CEO Dear Sir, I must ask for your unreserved help First of all, I must ask for your trust in this transaction due to its absolute secret and top secret nature. Although I know that a deal of this magnitude would worry and worry anyone, I promise you that everything will be okay in the end. Due to the urgency of this transaction, we decided to contact you because we have been reliably informed of the speed and confidentiality of this transaction. Let me first formally introduce myself to you. I am Dr ANAYO Awka, Manager of Union Bank of Lagos, Nigeria. I learned about you while privately looking for a reliable and reputable person to handle a very confidential transaction involving the transfer of a large amount of money to a foreign account that requires the greatest degree of confidentiality. A foreigner, the late engineer William Adams, an oil merchant/contractor for the federal government of Nigeria until he died in a horrific air crash three years ago, had US$22.2 million in our bank PLC in Lagos (US$22 million, US$200,000), and the bank now no doubt wants any available foreign close relatives to claim the money or donate it to a discredited weapons and ammunition trust fund at the Military War Academy of Nigeria. Union Bank is making a passionate and valuable effort to get in touch with anyone nearby. A close relative of William Adams (who had no known wife or children) said that under the influence of our chairman, board of directors, and retired Major General Karu Uk Kalou, management made an arrangement to declare the fund "UNCLIAMABLE" and then donate it to the Arms and Ammunition Trust Fund, which will further strengthen the war process in Africa and the world. To avoid this negative development, some of my trusted colleagues at the bank and I are now seeking your permission to become a deceased engineer. A close relative of WILLIAMS ADAMS, so that the US$22.2 million in funds will then be transferred and deposited into your bank account as a close relative of the beneficiary. All documents and certificates that enable you to obtain this funding have been carefully formulated and we assure you of 100% risk-free participation. Your portion will be 30% of the total cost, 10% has been set aside for expenses, and the rest will be set aside for my colleagues and I use in your country. If you agree to this recommendation and you do not want to take advantage of the trust we hope to place in you and your company, please contact me immediately at my email address and provide me with your most confidential phone numbers, faxes and emails so that I can forward relevant details of this transaction to you. Thank you in advance for your cooperation. Thank you very much. Dr. ANAYO Awka (Manager, Union Bank of Nigeria).

text: 18. 主任，寻求立即协助(转账1,550万美元)我很高兴地请求您就这项业务提供协助，如果能达成协议，将对我们双方都有极大的好处。这个请求可能看起来很奇怪，但我会恳求您的宽恕，并祈求您认真对待它。我是刚果民主共和国的维克多·阿洛马上校我是刚果民主共和国正式总统洛朗·卡比拉的亲密助手之一，愿他的灵魂得到安息。为了让洛朗·卡比拉的军队驱逐我国的暴徒，我受他(已故总统卡比拉)的指示去欧洲购买价值15.5美元(1550万美元)的武器和弹药来打击恐怖组织。但当它成为美联社的时候！卡比拉总统的一名助手在一次血腥枪战中被他的一名助手击毙。我立即决定将这笔资金(15.5美元)转移到一家私人保安公司保管。这笔钱目前在荷兰(荷兰)，在卡比勒总统去世后，我目前正流亡在那里。我需要一个可靠和值得信赖的外国合作伙伴/国民，他可以帮助我清算并将这笔钱从安全公司转移到受益人。虽然我们没有见过面，但我希望这笔交易能在两周内以谦虚和诚实的方式妥善处理，取得巨大成功，因为这是你我之间的交易，因此考虑到安全问题，需要保密。因此，如果你愿意帮助我将这笔资金转移出荷兰，你可以通过上面的电子邮件地址联系我，以便我们讨论更多关于这笔交易的事情，以及你将为我提供帮助的百分比。请注意，你将被要求对荷兰进行一次简短的旅行，以检查基金。我还打算尽快访问贵国，以探询可能的商业投资领域。如果我的请求得到满足，我将由衷地高兴。维克多·阿洛马
text_translated: 18. Director, seeking immediate assistance (transfer of US$15.5 million) I am pleased to request your assistance on this business, which would be of great benefit to both of us if an agreement could be reached. This request may seem strange, but I will ask for your forgiveness and ask you to take it seriously. I am Victor Alohma of the Democratic Republic of the Congo. I am one of the close aides to Laurent Kabila, the official President of the Democratic Republic of the Congo. May his soul rest in peace. In order for Laurent Kabila's army to drive out the thugs in my country, I was instructed by him (the late President Kabila) to go to Europe to purchase US$15.5 (US$15.5 million) worth of weapons and ammunition to fight terrorist organizations. But when it became The Associated Press! An aide to President Kabila was shot dead by one of his aides in a bloody gun battle. I immediately decided to transfer the funds ($15.50) to a private security company for safekeeping. The money is currently in the Netherlands (Netherlands), where I am currently in exile after the death of President Kabile. I need a reliable and trustworthy foreign partner/national who can help me liquidate and transfer the money from the security company to the beneficiary. Although we have not met, I hope this deal can be properly handled in a humble and honest manner within two weeks and achieve great success, because it is a deal between you and me, so considering security issues, it needs to be kept confidential. So if you would like to help me move this money out of the Netherlands, you can contact me via the email address above so that we can discuss more about the deal and the percentage you will be able to help me. text: 25. 来自ADE Williamsi AM由Dr.(夫人)执导Maryam Abacha，已故尼日利亚前军事首脑Sani Abacha将军的妻子，1998年6月8日死于心脏问题。我联系您是因为需要处理家人和我以前没有私人关系的人。自从她丈夫去世以来，这家人受到了各种各样的骚扰和恐吓，政府和媒体对她丈夫的负面报道层出不穷。现政府还确保冻结我们的银行账户和所有资产。今年年初，我们被迫支付了一笔(1.68亿美元)，而就在两个月前，他们被迫签署了一包2.6亿美元，有鉴于此，我请求您的合作和协助，将这笔3500万美元(仅3500万美元)的款项转移到我们拥有和控制的最后一笔家庭基金。联邦政府没收了我们的所有财产，并冻结了我们所有的本地和国际账户。在她丈夫去世后，但我们现在唯一的希望是这笔3500万美元的可用现金，我仔细地包装好，作为摄影材料存放在洛美-多哥的一家保安公司。也就是说，这笔钱是以编码的形式存在的，因此我们需要您的紧急帮助将这笔钱转移到AFRICA以外的地方。如果您愿意帮助我们代表我们接收这笔钱，请通过上述电子邮件地址联系我的个人助理，我向您保证，您将得到丰厚的回报。由于显而易见的原因，请确保对这笔交易保密。我们等待您的立即回复。诚挚的，阿德·威廉姆斯。为博士(夫人)玛丽亚姆·阿巴查。)PS：资金将由您代表家庭进行投资。回复：adewilliams202@fastermail.com
text_translated: 25. From ADE Williamsi AM by Dr. Director Maryam Abacha, wife of the late General Sani Abacha, former military chief of Nigeria, died of heart problems on June 8, 1998. I contacted you because I needed to deal with family members and people I had no previous personal relationship with. Since her husband's death, the family has been subjected to various harassment and intimidation, and negative reports of her husband have emerged from the government and media. The current government has also ensured that our bank accounts and all assets are frozen. We were forced to make a payment ($168 million) at the beginning of this year, and just two months ago, they were forced to sign a package of $260 million, and in view of this, I ask for your cooperation and assistance in transferring this $35 million (only $35 million) to the last family fund we own and control. The federal government confiscated all our property and froze all our local and international accounts. After her husband passed away, but our only hope now is this $35 million in available cash, which I carefully packed and stored as photographic material at a security company in Lomé Togo. That is, the money is in coded form, so we need your urgent help to move the money outside of AFRICA. If you would like to help us receive this money on our behalf, please contact my personal assistant at the email address above, and I promise you that you will be well rewarded. For obvious reasons, please ensure that this transaction is kept confidential. We await your immediate reply. Sincerely, Ade Williams. For Dr.(Mrs.) Mariam Abacha.) PS: The funds will be invested by you on behalf of the family. Reply: adewilliams202@fastermail.com

text: 29. 尊敬的先生/女士，我写信是想通知您，我希望代表尼日利亚联邦工程和住房部合同和财政分配司司长在贵国购买地产或地产。考虑到他的战略地位和影响力，他会希望这笔交易尽可能严格保密。他还希望至少在交易完成之前，他的身份不会被披露。因此，我们希望有一家海外代理商。因此，我奉命询问贵公司是否同意担任我方的海外代理，以便达成这笔交易。简而言之，我们打算用来在贵国进行投资的资金目前在尼日利亚Apex银行(即尼日利亚中央银行)的一个编码账户中，我们需要您的帮助将资金转移到贵国的一个方便的银行账户中，该账户将由您提供，然后我们才能在贵国使用这些资金。为此，您将被视为已为尼日利亚联邦工程和住房部签署了一份合同，合同金额为2,740万美元，合同金额为2,740万美元，其中25%为您的份额，如果您同意担任我们的海外代理，则为5%的费用。一旦付款完成，并将上述金额成功转入您的账户，我们打算使用我们自己的份额在国外购买一些房地产。为此，你方也将担任我们的代理。有鉴于此，我想请你将以下信息转交给我：1.你的公司名称和地址(如果有的话)2.你的个人传真号码3.你的个人电话号码，以便沟通。请您通过我的上述电子邮件地址通知您接受这项建议，然后我们将详细讨论完成这笔交易的方式。您的快速回复将不胜感激。期待着您的合作，谢谢您。您忠实的詹姆斯·阿尔伯特医生
text_translated: 29. Dear Mr./Madam, I am writing to inform you that I wish to purchase real estate or real estate in your country on behalf of the Director of the Contracts and Financial Allocation Division of the Federal Ministry of Works and Housing of Nigeria. Given his strategic position and influence, he would want the deal to be as strictly confidential as possible. He also hopes his identity will not be disclosed until at least the deal is completed. Therefore, we hope to have an overseas agent. Therefore, I was ordered to inquire if you would agree to act as our overseas agent in order to conclude this transaction. In short, the funds we intend to use to invest in your country are currently in a coded account at Apex Bank, Nigeria (the Central Bank of Nigeria), and we need your help to transfer the funds to a convenient bank account in your country that will be provided by you before we can use the funds in your country. To this end, you will be deemed to have signed a contract for the Federal Ministry of Works and Housing of Nigeria for a contract amount of US$27.4 million and a contract amount of US$27.4 million, of which 25% will be your share and 5% of the fee if you agree to serve as our overseas agent. Once the payment is completed and the above amount has been successfully transferred to your account, we intend to use our own share to purchase some real estate abroad. To this end, you will also act as our agent. In view of this, I would like you to pass on the following information to me: 1. Your company name and address (if any)2. Your personal fax number 3. Your personal telephone number for communication purposes. text_translated: 37. Office of Dr. John Ejime, Financial Director of the National Petroleum Company of Nigeria-Lagos, Nigeria. Telephone/fax: 2341 7592865. Emergency business processing requests. Dear Sir, I am Dr. John Ejime, Chief Financial Officer of the Lagos Headquarters of the National Petroleum Company of Nigeria. I am writing to you on behalf of my colleagues at the company and have been assigned to seek the help of a responsible foreign company through which we can only transfer US$35 million (US$35 million). The funds were deposited in the corporate treasury account at Apex Bank. Funding source: The money came from the deliberate false invoicing of a contract awarded by my ministry to a foreign company by the National Oil Company of Nigeria during the twilight of the previous military regime. This contract has been fully executed and entrusted, and the contractor handling the contract has received its full and final payment, thereby leaving the above-mentioned amount, i.e., the amount overinvoiced. We have been protecting this money so that it can be transferred abroad for our personal use in a favorable time. However, the employment code does not allow us (civil servants) to own and operate foreign accounts because contracts are processed by foreign companies and payments are made in U.S. dollars, and we now need a foreign partner who will act as a subcontractor so that the funds will be transferred to your company or individual's account. Your address was provided to us by a good friend who works in the Export Promotion Council of Nigeria. He assured us of your company's viability and commercial transaction capabilities. This assurance gives us the courage to connect you in this deal, which I hope will be beneficial to all of us. Please note that the nature of your business is not particularly relevant to the success of the transaction. All we need is for you to be willing to identify yourself as a subcontractor by providing your bank information so that the funds will be transferred to your account. Share ratio: As your assistance in this business, your share will be 30% of the total fund. My colleagues and I will charge a 60% commission, and we will set aside 10% to cover any fees that may be incurred during the course of the transaction. If you'd like to help us with this business. Send the following information. 1. Your bank name and address 2. Your account number/beneficiary name. 3. Your personal phone and fax numbers for easy communication. This information will allow us to submit payment approvals to relevant ministries and ultimately to the Senate Contract Payments Committee for a period of 14 business days from the date we receive the above information. All methods to initiate this transaction have been worked out and we will take further action as soon as we receive your news. As mentioned above, I am waiting for your fax at 234-1-7592865. Loyal and loyal. Dr. John Ejim.

text_translated: 37. Office of Dr. John Ejime, Financial Director of the National Petroleum Company of Nigeria-Lagos, Nigeria. Telephone/fax: 2341 7592865. Emergency business processing requests. Dear Sir, I am Dr. John Ejime, Chief Financial Officer of the Lagos Headquarters of the National Petroleum Company of Nigeria. I am writing to you on behalf of my colleagues at the company and have been assigned to seek the help of a responsible foreign company through which we can only transfer US$35 million (US$35 million). The funds were deposited in the corporate treasury account at Apex Bank. Funding source: The money came from the deliberate false invoicing of a contract awarded by my ministry to a foreign company by the National Oil Company of Nigeria during the twilight of the previous military regime. This contract has been fully executed and entrusted, and the contractor handling the contract has received its full and final payment, thereby leaving the above-mentioned amount, i.e., the amount overinvoiced. We have been protecting this money so that it can be transferred abroad for our personal use in a favorable time. However, the employment code does not allow us (civil servants) to own and operate foreign accounts because contracts are processed by foreign companies and payments are made in U.S. dollars, and we now need a foreign partner who will act as a subcontractor so that the funds will be transferred to your company or individual's account. Your address was provided to us by a good friend who works in the Export Promotion Council of Nigeria. He assured us of your company's viability and commercial transaction capabilities. This assurance gives us the courage to connect you in this deal, which I hope will be beneficial to all of us. Please note that the nature of your business is not particularly relevant to the success of the transaction. All we need is for you to be willing to identify yourself as a subcontractor by providing your bank information so that the funds will be transferred to your account. Share ratio: As your assistance in this business, your share will be 30% of the total fund. My colleagues and I will charge a 60% commission, and we will set aside 10% to cover any fees that may be incurred during the course of the transaction. If you'd like to help us with this business. Send the following information. 1. Your bank name and address 2. Your account number/beneficiary name. 3. Your personal phone and fax numbers for easy communication. This information will allow us to submit payment approvals to relevant ministries and ultimately to the Senate Contract Payments Committee for a period of 14 business days from the date we receive the above information. All methods to initiate this transaction have been worked out and we will take further action as soon as we receive your news. As mentioned above, I am waiting for your fax at 234-1-7592865. Loyal and loyal. Dr. John Ejim.

text: 38. 主题：商业观点重要提示：你好，对于一个你不认识的人来说，这似乎是非常可悲的。我的名字叫克莱门特·阿普特，我是一名律师，也是我的客户的密友，而我的客户恰好也是我的嫂子。我之所以联系你，是因为我的客户迫切需要与某个不是这个国家的人合作，因为他们在这个国家的家庭现状，特别是因为你有固定的地址或我说的固定责任，这可以作为与你建立合作伙伴关系的一个很好的理由。目前的情况，需要很好的理解和判断力。我的嫂子和她的整个家庭都在遭受一些沉溺于权力的邪恶分子的手中的痛苦。这只是国家元首的个人恩怨，因为他在1997年被我的委托人丈夫的政权监禁，因为他实际上策划了一场反对当时他们军政府的政变，当时他们正在掌权。很明显，我们的现任国家元首想要利用他的权力来解决他对我客户家人的个人仇恨。这个人一心想要摧毁我客户的家人。由于现在这个报复性的政府掌权，这家人几乎失去了他们家族的所有金钱和财产。他们的银行账户全部被冻结，我帮助管理的资产和财产被没收，直到今天仍然无法使用。他的政府散布了这么多针对他们家人的谣言，这是又一次诽谤运动，主要目的是挫败、羞辱、肢解和扩大对我当事人家人的仇恨。现在这个家庭的任何成员都完全不可能采取任何行动，因为整个家庭都受到旅行限制。大约几个月前，我们又被挤压了3.95亿美元，这些坏人完全破坏了所有这些资金都可以独立确定的事实。目前，这家人发现很难管理，因为我们已经完全用完了资源，因为夫人和她的孩子们的一切都被夺走了。我的当事人需要一个可以倾诉的人，目前这家人还有一些总额为8400万美元的钱和一些零星的现金，家人把这些钱分散存放在亚洲和欧洲两个国家的不同证券机构的金库里。这些钱的存在根本不为任何人所知，甚至连妈妈的所有孩子都不知道，除了她的大儿子。这笔钱被当做珠宝存放了起来。这是为了保持高度保密而采取的预防措施，因为这是这家人唯一可以依靠的东西。所以我们希望你对这件事保密。女士希望合伙人尽快采取行动，取回存放在这些保安机构中的一些钱，并按照适当的指示进行处理。这家人需要有人帮他们提取存款，因为他们家在这个国家的经济状况很差，因为他们在这里的所有财产都被拿走了。我们正在寻找一个理解的合作伙伴，可以与我们合作。我们所需要的就是帮助家人去取回存放在这些地方的任何一笔存款，并由你安全保管，因为由于旅行限制，我们都不能离开这个国家。第二，这样你就可以随时从他们的钱中提取你拥有的一小部分，并在家人非常需要的时候把钱寄到我们这里。通过这种方式，他们可以继续维持家庭，直到他们从敌人手中解放出来。作为他们的律师，我将指导你如何去做。我们将为您提供代表我的客户提出索赔的所有法律文件。请放心，您在申请这些存款时不会有任何问题或困难，因为没有人知道这笔钱的存在。当我们开始谈判并达成合理的妥协时，所有细节都将提供给你，直到我获得你的信任，我们才能合作。我们将就家庭提供给你的钱的一定比例进行谈判，以换取你预期的援助和合作伙伴关系。请立即将您的决定通知我，以便停止进一步的联系。我在等待你的回复。注-您也可以通过我的安全邮件与我联系：Clem-Aputa@Earth ling.net我想要您的私人电话号码，以便我们可以更好地讨论。你好，克莱门特·阿普特。Esq.
text_translated: thirty-eight。 Topic: business point of view important hint: Hello, this seems very sad for someone you don't know. My name is Clement apt. I am a lawyer and a close friend of my client, who happens to be my sister-in-law. I contact you because my client urgently needs to work with someone who is not in this country, because of their current family situation in this country, especially because you have a fixed address or what I call a fixed responsibility. this can be used as a good reason to establish a partnership with you. The current situation requires good understanding and judgment. My sister-in-law and her whole family are suffering at the hands of some evil elements addicted to power. This is only a personal vendetta of the head of state, because he was imprisoned by my client's husband's regime in 1997, because he actually planned a coup against their junta at that time, when they were in power. It is clear that our current head of state wants to use his power to resolve his personal hatred of my client's family. This man is bent on destroying my client's family. Now that the retaliatory government is in power, the family has lost almost all their money and property. Their bank accounts were all frozen and the assets and property I helped manage were confiscated and are still unavailable to this day. His Government has spread so many rumors against their families that this is another libel campaign, mainly aimed at thwarting, humiliating, dismembering and expanding hatred against my client's family. It is now impossible for any member of the family to take any action because the whole family is subject to travel restrictions. About a few months ago, we were squeezed another $395 million, and these bad guys completely destroyed the fact that all these funds could be determined independently. At present, the family finds it difficult to manage because we have completely used up our resources, because everything from the wife and her children has been taken away. My client needs someone to talk to. At present, the family still has some money totaling $84 million and some sporadic cash, which the family keeps in the vaults of different securities institutions in Asia and Europe. The existence of the money is unknown to anyone, not even all of the mother's children, except her eldest son. The money was deposited as jewelry. This is a precaution to maintain a high degree of secrecy because it is the only thing the family can rely on. So we want you to keep it a secret. The lady hopes that the partners will take action as soon as possible to recover some of the money deposited in these security agencies and deal with it in accordance with appropriate instructions. The family needs someone to withdraw their savings because their economic situation in this country is very poor, because all their property here has been taken away. We are looking for an understanding partner who can cooperate with us. All we need is to help our family get back any of the deposits deposited in these places and keep them safe because we can't leave the country because of travel restrictions. Second, so that you can withdraw a small portion of your money from them at any time and send it to us when your family is in great need. In this way, they can continue to maintain their families until they are liberated from the enemy. As their lawyer, I will teach you how to do it. We will provide you with all the legal documents to file a claim on behalf of my client. Please rest assured that you will not have any problems or difficulties in applying for these deposits, because no one knows the existence of the money. When we begin to negotiate and reach a reasonable compromise, all the details will be provided to you, and we will not be able to cooperate until I gain your trust. We will negotiate a certain percentage of the money provided to you by your family in exchange for your expected assistance and partnership. Please inform me of your decision immediately in order to stop further contact. I'm waiting for your reply. Note-you can also contact me via my secure email: Clem-Aputa@Earth ling.net I want your private phone number so that we can discuss it better. Hello, Clement apt. Esq.

text_translated: thirty-eight。 Topic: business point of view important hint: Hello, this seems very sad for someone you don't know. My name is Clement apt. I am a lawyer and a close friend of my client, who happens to be my sister-in-law. I contact you because my client urgently needs to work with someone who is not in this country, because of their current family situation in this country, especially because you have a fixed address or what I call a fixed responsibility. this can be used as a good reason to establish a partnership with you. The current situation requires good understanding and judgment. My sister-in-law and her whole family are suffering at the hands of some evil elements addicted to power. This is only a personal vendetta of the head of state, because he was imprisoned by my client's husband's regime in 1997, because he actually planned a coup against their junta at that time, when they were in power. It is clear that our current head of state wants to use his power to resolve his personal hatred of my client's family. This man is bent on destroying my client's family. Now that the retaliatory government is in power, the family has lost almost all their money and property. Their bank accounts were all frozen and the assets and property I helped manage were confiscated and are still unavailable to this day. His Government has spread so many rumors against their families that this is another libel campaign, mainly aimed at thwarting, humiliating, dismembering and expanding hatred against my client's family. It is now impossible for any member of the family to take any action because the whole family is subject to travel restrictions. About a few months ago, we were squeezed another $395 million, and these bad guys completely destroyed the fact that all these funds could be determined independently. At present, the family finds it difficult to manage because we have completely used up our resources, because everything from the wife and her children has been taken away. My client needs someone to talk to. At present, the family still has some money totaling $84 million and some sporadic cash, which the family keeps in the vaults of different securities institutions in Asia and Europe. The existence of the money is unknown to anyone, not even all of the mother's children, except her eldest son. The money was deposited as jewelry. This is a precaution to maintain a high degree of secrecy because it is the only thing the family can rely on. So we want you to keep it a secret. The lady hopes that the partners will take action as soon as possible to recover some of the money deposited in these security agencies and deal with it in accordance with appropriate instructions. The family needs someone to withdraw their savings because their economic situation in this country is very poor, because all their property here has been taken away. We are looking for an understanding partner who can cooperate with us. All we need is to help our family get back any of the deposits deposited in these places and keep them safe because we can't leave the country because of travel restrictions. Second, so that you can withdraw a small portion of your money from them at any time and send it to us when your family is in great need. In this way, they can continue to maintain their families until they are liberated from the enemy. As their lawyer, I will teach you how to do it. We will provide you with all the legal documents to file a claim on behalf of my client. Please rest assured that you will not have any problems or difficulties in applying for these deposits, because no one knows the existence of the money. When we begin to negotiate and reach a reasonable compromise, all the details will be provided to you, and we will not be able to cooperate until I gain your trust. We will negotiate a certain percentage of the money provided to you by your family in exchange for your expected assistance and partnership. Please inform me of your decision immediately in order to stop further contact. I'm waiting for your reply. Note-you can also contact me via my secure email: Clem-Aputa@Earth ling.net I want your private phone number so that we can discuss it better. Hello, Clement apt. Esq.

text: 20. 尊敬的先生/马，这是向美国和加拿大介绍我们公司Briscoat全球制造有限公司英国有限公司。该公司成立于1946年，第一家分公司设在南安普敦，最初也是一家独资企业，直到1949年，该公司打开了合作的机会。今天，公司自豪地告诉广大公众，我们在非洲、亚洲、南极洲和东欧拥有3000多名员工。我们的专业领域：布里斯科全球制造。我司是一家专业生产动力传送带、传送带、工业橡胶制品等胶带产品的企业，我们的目标是：为全世界的弱势群体和失业人员提供最好、最好的就业机会，提供责任、创造力和优质的政策。我们提供优质的产品和服务，以合理的价格满足客户的满意，并继续前进。我们的工业橡胶产品在英国和亚洲销量很大，正在努力打入美国和加拿大市场。我们很快就会在美国开设代表处或授权销售点，因此我们目前正在寻找人员帮助我们在那里建立新的分销网络。事实是，尽管美国市场对我们来说是新的，我们自己也已经有了固定客户。我们对您的要求是：在联合王国的法人(公司)的国际转账税非常高，这对公司不利。个人进行国际转账的税是7%。这就是为什么我们需要您！我们需要代理商从我们的客户那里收到我们的工业橡胶产品的付款，并通过我们在英国或西联汇款的银行账户转账给我们，而税率是7%加25%，这对我们公司绝对有利。接受客户以支票、余额转账或银行至银行电子转账的方式付款2.在您的银行支付现金。在每一次付款过程中，扣除支付给雇员作为佣金的10%。将扣除10%佣金后的余额转给办事处，一旦资金到位，我们将立即提供给办事处。您的总收入：每次运营10%！例如：您通过上面列出的任何付款方式收到5000英镑，您的佣金将为您自己每笔交易500英镑(5000美元的10%)。一开始你的佣金将等于10%，但后来它将增加到12%！你做的交易越多，你的收入就越多，佣金率也有上升的趋势。建议：你不必外出，因为你将作为一名独立的承包人直接从你的家庭办公室工作。你的工作绝对是合法的。根据你在这份工作上花费的时间，你每月可以赚到3000-4000美元。你不需要任何资本就可以开始。你可以在不离开或影响你目前的工作的情况下方便地完成这项工作。付出更多努力、工作更努力的员工很有可能成为我们任何一家分支机构的分支机构经理。无论如何，我们可以自豪地说，我们的员工从未因为恶劣的工作条件而减少。能力：感兴趣的人必须至少18岁或以上，能够合法地准备每周工作3-4个小时。具备PC知识、电子邮件和互联网经验(最低限度)。请通过briscoatadmin@sify.com联系我们，使您更多地了解我们公司。致以最诚挚的敬意，行政/人力资源经理雷蒙德·乔治
text_translated: 20. Dear Mr. / Ma, this is an introduction to our company, Briscoat Global Manufacturing Co., Ltd., UK Ltd., to the United States and Canada. The company was founded in 1946 with its first branch in Southampton and was initially a sole proprietorship until 1949, when the company opened up opportunities for cooperation. Today, the company is proud to tell the general public that we have more than 3000 employees in Africa, Asia, Antarctica and Eastern Europe. Our area of expertise: Brisco global manufacturing. Division I is a company specializing in the production of power conveyor belts, conveyor belts, industrial rubber products and other tape products, our goal is to provide the world's vulnerable groups and the unemployed with the best and best employment opportunities, provide responsibility, creativity and quality policies. We provide quality products and services, satisfy customer satisfaction at reasonable prices, and continue to move forward. Our industrial rubber products sell well in the UK and Asia and are trying to break into the United States and Canada. We will soon open a representative office or authorized point of sale in the United States, so we are currently looking for people to help us set up a new distribution network there. The truth is, although the American market is new to us, we already have regular customers. What we ask of you is that the international transfer tax on legal persons (companies) in the United Kingdom is very high, which is disadvantageous to the company. The tax on international transfers by individuals is 7%. That's why we need you! We need agents to receive payment for our industrial rubber products from our customers and transfer them to us through our bank account in the UK or Western Union at a tax rate of 7% plus 25%, which is absolutely beneficial to our company. Accept payment by cheque, balance transfer or bank-to-bank electronic transfer 2. Pay cash at your bank. In the course of each payment, deduct 10% of the commission paid to the employee. Transfer the balance after deducting 10% commission to the office, and we will provide it to the office as soon as the funds are in place. Your total income: 10% per operation! For example, if you receive £5000 through any of the payment methods listed above, your commission will be £500for each transaction (10 per cent of $5000). At first your commission will be equal to 10%, but then it will increase to 12%! The more transactions you make, the more income you earn, and the commission rate tends to rise. Advice: you don't have to go out because you will work directly from your home office as an independent contractor. Your job is absolutely legal. Depending on how much time you spend on the job, you can earn $3000 to $4000 a month. You don't need any capital to start. You can easily finish this job without leaving or affecting your current job. Employees who work harder and harder are likely to become branch managers in any of our branches. In any case, we can proudly say that our staff has never been reduced because of poor working conditions. Ability: interested people must be at least 18 years old or older and can legally prepare to work 3-4 hours a week. Knowledge of PC, email and Internet experience (minimum). Please contact us through briscoatadmin@sify.com to let you know more about our company. With the sincerest respect, Raymond George, Executive / Human Resources Manager

text_translated: 20. TINUBU Square, Lagos NIGERIAEMAIL-Smith_j@mailsurf.com 23TH of August 2002 ATTN: President/CEO Strictly Private Business PROPOSALI is Mr Johnson S. Abu, Director of Bills and Convertions at the Foreign Exchange Payments Department of the Central Bank of Nigeria. I am writing to ask for your support and cooperation in developing this business opportunity in my department. We discovered that SumOfus worth $37,400,000.00 ($37.4 million) had been abandoned in the account of one of our foreign customers, a late American engineer. John Crick (Juvenile), an oil businessman in the federal government of Nigeria, died in November 2000 with his wife and the family of two children on Airbus (A310-300) KQ430 in Kenya. Since we heard about his death, we have been expecting his next of kin to come over and file a claim for his money as heirs, because we cannot lease funds from his account unless someone files a claim as a next of kin of the deceased, as stated in our bank guidelines. Unfortunately, neither their family nor distant relatives appear to have claimed the funds. Based on this discovery, other officials in my department and I have agreed to do business with you and deposit the entire amount into your account as the heir to the fund because no one has come to withdraw the money or discover that you have an account at my bank, otherwise the funds will be returned to the bank vault as unclaimed funds. We agreed that our share ratio would be as follows: 30% for you as a foreign partner and 70% for an official in our department. When this transfer is successfully completed, my colleagues and I will travel to your country to remember our share. This is 60% of ours, and we plan to import computer parts into our country as a way to recover our money. In order to start this transaction, we ask you to immediately call me or send a fax at the above-mentioned telex number to immediately indicate your interest, enclosing your personal contact telephone number, fax number, full name and address and your designated bank coordinator so that we can submit a claim to the appropriate department before transferring the money to obtain the necessary approvals. In addition, due to the nature of the transaction, it must be strictly confidential. Note: Please remember to give me your phone and fax numbers. Johnson Smith Abu-Ireland Linux User Group: ilug@linux.iehttp://www.linux.ie/mailman/listinfo/ilug for (United Nations) subscription information.

text: 80. 尊敬的先生，我是詹姆斯·阿拉比博士，尼日利亚联邦政府根据新的民事分配制度成立的合同和审查委员会的主席，负责授予新合同和审查现有合同。我在寻找一位可靠和有信誉的人来处理一笔非常保密的交易时得知您的消息，该交易涉及将一大笔资金转移到外国账户。石油行业的一个多国财团签署了一系列合同，这些合同的原始价值故意多开了12,320,000.00美元(1232万美元)的发票。这笔款项现在已经得到批准，现在可以转账了，因为实际执行这些合同的公司已经全额付款，项目正式投入使用。因此，我和我的同事愿意将全部金额转入您的账户，以便以后支付，因为行为守则局(公务员法)禁止我们以自己的名义经营和/或开设外国账户。不用说，此时此刻委托你方的信任是巨大的，作为回报，我们同意向你方提供转账金额的20%，而10%将留作双方在交易过程中的杂费(内部和外部)，你方将受命在适当的时候将余额汇到其他账户。财政部和尼日利亚中央银行的最高层已经制定了在7个工作日内立即转账的方式，条件是你满足上述条件。我们的保证是您的角色是无风险的。为了赋予这笔交易应有的合法性和基金的共同安全，整个审批程序将以您的姓名或您指定为真正受益人的任何公司的名称进行正式和合法的处理。我想再一次让你明白，普京在我的国家担任公务员超过25年，我反对我的形象和职业生涯受到损害。因此，这件事应该得到最大程度的保密和它应得的紧迫感。请您通过回复这封电子邮件，表明您对这笔交易的立场，以表明您的协助意图，如果有利，我们将采取进一步措施，向您介绍这笔可行交易的全部细节。我想向您保证，这项业务提案是100%无风险的，因为我们已经做好了我们的作业。我相信贵方将严格保密这笔交易以保护我们的利益，因为我们仍在政府任职，我们打算完全退休。请加快行动，因为我们落后于计划，使我们能够在下一批中包括这笔转账，这将构成2002财政年度的新季度付款。谢谢你，愿上帝保佑。詹姆斯·阿拉比医生
text_translated: 80. Dear Sir, I am Dr. James Arabi, Chairman of the Contracts and Review Committee established by the Federal Government of Nigeria under the new civil distribution system to award new contracts and review existing contracts. I learned about you while looking for a reliable and reputable person to handle a very confidential transaction involving the transfer of a large amount of money to a foreign account. A multinational consortium in the oil industry signed a series of contracts that were deliberately overinvoiced by US$12,320,000.00 (US$12.32 million) over their original value. The amount has now been approved and can now be transferred because the company that actually executed the contracts has paid in full and the project is officially put into use. As a result, my colleagues and I are willing to transfer the entire amount to your account for future payments because the Code of Conduct Bureau (Civil Servants Act) prohibits us from operating and/or opening foreign accounts in our own name. Needless to say, the trust entrusted to you at this time is huge. In return, we agree to provide you with 20% of the transfer amount, and 10% will be reserved for miscellaneous expenses (internal and external) between the parties during the transaction, and you will be ordered to remit the balance to other accounts in due course. The Ministry of Finance and the Central Bank of Nigeria at the highest level have developed a method for immediate transfer within 7 working days, provided that you meet the above conditions. Our guarantee is that your role is risk-free. In order to give this transaction the legitimacy it deserves and the mutual security of the fund, the entire approval process will be formally and legally handled in your name or the name of any company you designate as the true beneficiary. I want you to understand once again that Putin has served as a civil servant in my country for more than 25 years, and I object to the damage to my image and career. Therefore, this matter should be accorded the greatest degree of confidentiality and the sense of urgency it deserves. Please state your position on this transaction by replying to this email to demonstrate your intention to assist, and if it is favorable, we will take further steps to introduce you to the full details of this feasible transaction. I want to assure you that this business proposal is 100% risk-free because we have done our homework. I trust you will keep this transaction strictly confidential to protect our interests, as we are still in the government and we intend to retire completely. Please act quickly as we are behind schedule, allowing us to include this transfer in the next tranche, which will constitute a new quarterly payment for fiscal year 2002. Thank you and may God bless. Dr. James Arabi

text: 147. 我是IKE JIOH先生。尼日利亚钻石银行拉各斯分行银行经理。我有一个紧急的、非常机密的商业建议给你。1999年6月6日，联邦航空部的一名外国石油顾问/承包商。巴里·凯利在我的分行存了12个月的定期存款，价值25,000,000.00美元(2500万美元)。到期后，我给他的转发地址发了一封例行通知，但没有收到回复。一个月后，我们发出了提醒，最终我们从他的雇主--联邦航空部--那里发现，巴里·凯利先生死于一场车祸。经过进一步调查，我发现他没有立遗嘱就去世了，所有试图寻找他的近亲的努力都是徒劳的。因此，我做了进一步的调查，发现巴里·凯利先生的所有官方文件，包括他在我的银行的存款文件，都没有申报任何亲属或关系。这笔25,000,000美元仍在我的银行，利息将在每年年底与本金一起展期。没有人会站出来认领这笔钱。根据尼日利亚法律，如果没有人申请认领这笔基金，这笔钱在6(6)年期满后将重新归尼日利亚政府所有。因此，我刚刚通过一家名为GLOBAL&BASIC金融公司的安全公司帮助将这笔资金送到荷兰。我希望您立即提供您的全名和地址，以便我准备必要的文件和宣誓书，这将使您成为安全公司这笔资金的所有者。本人将聘请一名律师对变更进行起草和公证，并获得以你为受益人的必要文件和遗嘱认证及遗产管理函。这完全没有风险，因为这笔交易的所有文书工作都将由律师完成，而我作为分行经理的职位保证了这笔交易的成功执行。如果您有兴趣，请立即通过私人电子邮件地址回复。在您作出答复后，我将向您提供更多细节和相关文件，帮助您了解交易。请遵守最高机密，并请放心，这笔交易对我们双方都是最有利可图的，因为我将需要您的帮助将我的股份投资于贵国。通过我的电子邮件等待您的紧急回复：谢谢和问候。IKE EJOH先生
text_translated: 147. I am Mr. Ike Jioh. Bank Manager, Lagos Branch, Diamond Bank of Nigeria. I have urgent, very confidential business advice for you. June 6, 1999, a foreign oil consultant/contractor for the Federal Aviation Department. Barry Kelly has a 12-month fixed deposit at my branch worth $25,000,000.00 ($25 million). After the expiration, I sent a routine notice to his forwarding address, but received no reply. A month later, we issued a reminder, and we finally found out from his employer, the Federal Aviation Department, that Mr. Barry Kelly had died in a car accident. After further investigation, I found that he had passed away without a will and that all attempts to find his next of kin were in vain. Therefore, I did further investigation and found that none of Mr. Barry Kelly's official documents, including his deposit documents at my bank, declared any relatives or relationships. The $25,000,000 is still in my bank, with interest rolled over with the principal at the end of each year. No one will stand up and claim the money. According to Nigeria law, if no one applies to claim the fund, the money will revert to the Nigeria government after the expiration of 6(6) years. So I just helped send this money to the Netherlands through a security company called GLOBAL&BASIC Financial. I want you to provide your full name and address immediately so that I can prepare the necessary documents and affidavits that will make you the owner of this security company's funds. I will hire a lawyer to draft and notarize the changes, and obtain the necessary documents and probate and estate management letters with you as the beneficiary. There is no risk at all, as all paperwork for the transaction will be done by lawyers, and my position as branch manager ensures the successful execution of the transaction. If you are interested, please respond immediately via a private email address. After you respond, I will provide you with more details and relevant documents to help you understand the transaction. text_translated: one hundred and ninety。 Text / plain text; character set = ISO-8859-1 content transfer-Encoding: 8bit Kevin George Abidjan,Cote D'vorie West Africa Dear one, although we haven't met yet, I got your contact through the Internet and decided to contact you for help. Until recently, I was a senior majoring in engineering at the University of Sierra Leone in West Africa. In early January last year, our rebels attacked our town and killed my parents in one of their attacks. My late father, King Christopher George, was the king of the town, and he was the main target. Fortunately for me, I was at school at the time of the attack. My only sister was also taken away by the rebels. When I returned home to bury my parents' bodies and subsequent funerals, I found a document showing that my late father had deposited approximately $6 million ($6 million) with a private security company on the coast of Abidjan. According to the commentary, the money is a car maintenance company that my late father set up for me after I finished my studies. After discovering this document, I went to Cote d Ivorie to track down the security company concerned and claimed the above payment as my father's only living close relative. But after careful consideration, I decided not to let all my uncles and aunts participate in this matter, because none of them would be happy to know that I had such money. I successfully convinced the people at the security company that I was the next person in Kin, and all the documents related to me are with me now. I don't know what to do with it, but I have decided to contact you, ask for your help, help me withdraw it from the security company, transfer it to your account, and help me come to your country to continue my education, so that you will help me get the capital investment until I am ready to start using it. I am really desperate, because I am alone in this world now. Let me know what you want as compensation for helping me solve this problem. Above all, I solemnly appeal to you to keep the whole matter highly confidential. Please call me Weiss. The number is 00225-075-03684. I am sincerely at your service, Kevin George Mail--une adresse@yahoo.fr Gratuite et en Franais! text: 197. 这是MIME格式的多部分邮件。-=_NextPart_000_020F_01C25394.F5A1C4C0内容类型：文本/纯文本；Charset=“iso-8859-1”内容传输编码：7Bit Bassey&Associates Falomo，Ikoyi。拉各斯--尼日利亚。请注意，RE：请求互惠互利的奋进。我诚挚地恳请您允许我给您发送这封邮件，如果内容不符合您的个人和商业道德，我提前表示歉意。我是大律师威廉姆斯·贝西(律师)，我代表Alhaji Ishmaila Ibrahim Gwarzo的遗产。Alhaji Gwarzo是这个国家(尼日利亚)当时的军事领导人的首席安全顾问，即已故的萨尼·阿巴查将军，他于1998年6月8日去世。随着奥卢塞贡·奥巴桑乔将军(RTD)领导的国家出现新的民主制度，我的当事人由于在上一届军事政权中担任敏感职位而受到严重迫害，目前他被软禁在仅限于他所在村庄的范围内。这封邮件的主要目的是让你了解一份你可能感兴趣的商业建议。我的客户告诉我，有一笔资金存放在国外的一家证券公司。这项基金是在我的客户担任时任总统首席安全顾问期间分配给他的投资组合的安全投票的一部分。发生的事情是，他将尼日利亚中央银行金库的部分资金转移到这个安全机构，目的是为当时的总统的个人安全机构购买武器弹药。但在购买之前，总统去世了。我的委托人欺骗他把这笔钱据为己有，因为他的所有财产都被现行制度没收了。但由于他被监禁，他不能外出旅行，也不能为了自己的利益而改变财产。我的客户委托我寻找一位外国合作伙伴，帮助他促成所有权的变更。执行这项工作所需的存款单和密码在我手中。有问题的资金是3360万美元(仅3300万，60万美元)。如果您对这一提议感兴趣，您可以通过我的电子邮件地址联系我，这样我们就可以了解一下这项工作的基本情况。我仍然非常感激。大律师贝思礼(太平绅士)主要合作伙伴。-Bassey&Associates-=_NextPart_000_020F_01C25394.F5A1C4C0内容-类型：文本/html内容-传输-编码：7Bit Bassey&Associates Falomo，Ikoyi。拉各斯--尼日利亚。请注意，RE：请求互惠互利的奋进。我诚挚地恳请您允许我给您发送这封邮件，如果内容不符合您的个人和商业道德，我提前表示歉意。我是大律师威廉姆斯·贝西(律师)，我代表Alhaji Ishmaila Ibrahim Gwarzo的遗产。Alhaji Gwarzo是这个国家(尼日利亚)当时的军事领导人的首席安全顾问，即已故的萨尼·阿巴查将军，他于1998年6月8日去世。随着奥卢塞贡·奥巴桑乔将军(RTD)领导的国家出现新的民主制度，我的当事人由于在上一届军事政权中担任敏感职位而受到严重迫害，目前他被软禁在仅限于他所在村庄的范围内。这封邮件的主要目的是让你了解一份你可能感兴趣的商业建议。我的客户告诉我，有一笔资金存放在国外的一家证券公司。这项基金是在我的客户担任时任总统首席安全顾问期间分配给他的投资组合的安全投票的一部分。发生的事情是，他将尼日利亚中央银行金库的部分资金转移到这个安全机构，目的是为当时的总统的个人安全机构购买武器弹药。但在购买之前，总统去世了。我的委托人欺骗他把这笔钱据为己有，因为他的所有财产都被现行制度没收了。但由于他被监禁，他不能外出旅行，也不能为了自己的利益而改变财产。我的客户委托我寻找一位外国合作伙伴，帮助他促成所有权的变更。执行这项工作所需的存款单和密码在我手中。有问题的资金是3360万美元(仅3300万，60万美元)。如果您对这一提议感兴趣，您可以通过我的电子邮件地址联系我，这样我们就可以了解一下这项工作的基本情况。我仍然非常感激。大律师贝思礼(太平绅士)主要合伙人-Bassey&Associates-=_NextPart_000_020F_01C25394.F5A1C4C0

I sincerely ask you to allow me to send you this email, and I apologize in advance if the content does not conform to your personal and business ethics. I am barrister Williams Bessie (lawyer) and I represent the estate of Alhaji Ishmaila Ibrahim Gwarzo. Alhaji Gwarzo was the chief security adviser to the country's then military leader, the late General Thani Abacha, who died on June 8, 1998. With the emergence of a new democracy in the country led by General Olusegun Obasanjo (RTD), my client has been severely persecuted for his sensitive positions in the previous military regime and is currently under house arrest limited to his village. The main purpose of this email is to let you know a business proposal that you may be interested in. My client told me that there was a sum of money deposited in a foreign securities company. The fund was part of the security vote allocated to my client's portfolio during his time as the president's chief security adviser. What happened was that he transferred some of the funds from the vault of the Central Bank of Nigeria to this security agency with the aim of purchasing weapons and ammunition for the then President's personal security agency. But before the purchase, the president died. My client tricked him into taking the money for himself because all his property was confiscated by the current system. But because he was imprisoned, he could not travel or change his property for his own benefit. My client entrusted me to find a foreign partner to help him with the change of ownership. I have the deposit slip and password needed to perform the work. The funding in question is $33.6 million (only $33 million, 600000). If you are interested in this proposal, you can contact me at my email address so that we can get the basics of the work. I'm still very grateful. Barrister Besley (JP) main partner. -Bassey&Associates-=_NextPart_000_020F_01C25394.F5A1C4C0 content-Type: text / html content-Transmission-Encoding: 7Bit Bassey&Associates Falomo,Ikoyi. Lagos-Nigeria. Please note that RE: ask for mutually beneficial progress. I sincerely ask you to allow me to send you this email, and I apologize in advance if the content does not conform to your personal and business ethics. I am barrister Williams Bessie (lawyer) and I represent the estate of Alhaji Ishmaila Ibrahim Gwarzo. Alhaji Gwarzo was the chief security adviser to the country's then military leader, the late General Thani Abacha, who died on June 8, 1998. With the emergence of a new democracy in the country led by General Olusegun Obasanjo (RTD), my client has been severely persecuted for his sensitive positions in the previous military regime and is currently under house arrest limited to his village. The main purpose of this email is to let you know a business proposal that you may be interested in. My client told me that there was a sum of money deposited in a foreign securities company. The fund was part of the security vote allocated to my client's portfolio during his time as the president's chief security adviser. What happened was that he transferred some of the funds from the vault of the Central Bank of Nigeria to this security agency with the aim of purchasing weapons and ammunition for the then President's personal security agency. But before the purchase, the president died. My client tricked him into taking the money for himself because all his property was confiscated by the current system. But because he was imprisoned, he could not travel or change his property for his own benefit. My client entrusted me to find a foreign partner to help him with the change of ownership. I have the deposit slip and password needed to perform the work. The funding in question is $33.6 million (only $33 million, 600000). If you are interested in this proposal, you can contact me at my email address so that we can get the basics of the work. I'm still very grateful. text: 199. 亲爱的合作伙伴，首先，我必须向你道歉，因为我使用这个媒体与你沟通这个项目。我是尼日利亚政府的高级官员，也是执政党的坚定成员，人民民主党。我的委员会-尼日尔三角洲发展公司-负责管理和监督尼日利亚政府的石油销售收入的支付。我们控制的收入每月有几个亿美元。我自己和其他在人民民主发展公司的同事目前需要一个外国合作伙伴，我们将用他的银行账户转账4900万美元500美元(4950万美元)。这笔资金应计入USAS在我们监督下处理的石油销售合同的佣金。该基金目前正在名为CBN/FINGNDENDENT收入账户400-939134的政府账户中等待J.P.Morgan CHASBANK，CHASBANK纽约。你可以对这一点进行独立核实。然而，基于我们作为公务员和国家发展委员会成员的身份，我们不能以我们的名义获得这笔资金。这是因为作为高级公务员，法律暂时不允许我们在国外拥有或经营银行账户。我的同事委托我寻找一个海外合作伙伴，我们将把资金转移到他的账户上，因此我收到了这封邮件的原因。我们将把这笔钱转移到您公司的账户中，因为我们将展示您的公司是一家注册的外国公司，在尼日利亚有一个分支机构，您将从通过NDDC和我们决定用来吸走资金的任何其他联邦部委为我国执行的合同中获得报酬。为了您的支持和合作，当资金到达你的银行账户时，请回复我协商你的费用或你希望支付的百分比。然而，你必须注意到，这笔交易，就我们继续与你的交易而言，是受这些条款的约束。首先，我们相信贵方的透明度。其次，贵方对这笔交易绝对保密。最后，最重要的是，您将提供您拥有绝对控制权的帐户。交易虽然是离散的，但是合法的，现在或将来对我们自己或您自己都没有风险或法律劣势，因为我们已经建立了完善的机制，一旦接受，将确保免费转账到您的帐户。一旦我们达成协议，转账将在十-十四(10-14)个工作日内生效，您向我提供了合适的银行帐户和公司名称，以及您所有的联系电话，包括传真号码。我期待着与您做生意，并在这笔交易中为您保密，请将您的回复邮寄给我。您诚挚的，Anderson K.Eseimoku
text_translated: 199. Dear partner, first of all, I must apologize to you for using this media to communicate with you about this project. I am a senior official of the Nigeria government and a strong member of the ruling party, the People's Democratic Party. My committee-the Niger Delta Development Company-manages and oversees the payment of oil sales revenue from the Nigeria government. The revenue we control is hundreds of millions of dollars a month. Myself and other colleagues at the People's Democratic Development Corporation currently need a foreign partner, and we will use his bank account to transfer US$49 million and US$500 (US$49.5 million). This funds should be counted towards commissions on oil sales contracts processed by USAS under our supervision. The fund is currently waiting in a government account called the CBN/FINGNDENDENT Income Account 400-939134 for J.P. Morgan CHASBANK, CHASBANK New York. You can verify this independently. However, based on our status as civil servants and members of the National Development Council, we cannot obtain this funding in our name. This is because as senior civil servants, the law temporarily prohibits us from owning or operating bank accounts abroad. My colleague entrusted me to find an overseas partner to whom we would transfer funds, so the reason why I received this email. We will transfer this money to your company's account because we will show that your company is a registered foreign company with a branch in Nigeria and you will be paid from contracts executed for our country through the NDDC and any other federal ministries we decide to use to siphon off funds. For your support and cooperation, when funds arrive in your bank account, please reply to me to negotiate your fee or the percentage you wish to pay. However, you must note that this transaction, as far as we continue to deal with you, is subject to these terms. First of all, we believe in your transparency. Secondly, you keep this transaction strictly confidential. Last but not least, you will provide an account over which you have absolute control. Although the transaction is discrete, it is legal and has no risk or legal disadvantage to ourselves or yourself now or in the future, as we have established a comprehensive mechanism that will ensure free transfers to your account once accepted. Once we reach an agreement, the transfer will take effect within ten-fourteen (10-14) business days, and you have provided me with the appropriate bank account and company name, as well as all your contact phone numbers, including fax numbers. I look forward to doing business with you and keeping this transaction confidential. Please mail me your response. Yours sincerely, Anderson K.Eseimoku

Although the transaction is discrete, it is legal and has no risk or legal disadvantage to ourselves or yourself now or in the future, as we have established a comprehensive mechanism that will ensure free transfers to your account once accepted. Once we reach an agreement, the transfer will take effect within ten-fourteen (10-14) business days, and you have provided me with the appropriate bank account and company name, as well as all your contact phone numbers, including fax numbers.
