text: 208. 亲爱的朋友，我是已故扎伊尔总统蒙博托·塞塞-塞科的遗孀塞塞-塞科夫人，现在被称为刚果民主共和国(刚果民主共和国)。我很感动能给你写这封信。考虑到我目前的情况和处境，这是保密的。我和我的丈夫以及我们的两个儿子James Kongolo和Nzanga一起从刚果民主共和国逃到科特迪瓦的阿比让，我和家人在那里定居，后来我们搬到莫罗科定居，我的丈夫后来在那里死于癌症。然而，由于这种情况，我们决定将我丈夫存放在瑞士银行和其他国家的数十亿美元中的大部分改为其他形式的资金，以确保安全，因为(Dr)新任国家元首洛朗·卡比拉先生已与瑞士政府和其他欧洲国家达成协议，冻结我已故丈夫在一些欧洲国家存放的所有财富。因此，我和我的孩子们决定在非洲低调地研究一下情况，直到情况好转。就像现在，卡比拉总统去世了，他的儿子接任(约瑟夫·卡比拉)。我已故丈夫在法国南部的一座城堡被法国政府没收，因此我不得不改变身份，这样我的投资就不会被追查和没收。我已经存入了1800万美元(1800亿美元)。为了安全起见与保安公司合作。我想要你做的是表明你的兴趣，你可以帮助我们以我们的名义收到这笔钱，这样我就可以把你介绍给我的儿子(Kongolo)，他有申领上述资金的方式。我希望你帮助投资这笔钱，但我不想让我的身份被暴露。我还想购买房地产和跨国公司的股票，并按照你自己的建议从事其他安全和非投机性的投资。在这一点上，我想强调这个即将到来的项目所要求的高度保密，并希望你不要辜负我对你的信任和信心。最后，如果你想帮助我们，我的儿子(Kongolo)将向你透露关于这个项目的所有简报，告诉你目前资金的维护情况，并讨论你的服务报酬。为此，请提供你的联系方式，即你的个人电话和传真号码，以供验证，并使用上述电子邮件地址确认收到本邮件。Mariam M.Seseko夫人--爱尔兰Linux用户组社交活动：social@linux.iehttp://www.linux.ie/mailman/listinfo/social获取(联合国)订阅信息。列表维护者：listmaster@linux.ie
text_translated: 208. Dear friends, I am Mrs. Sese Seko, widow of the late President Mobutu Sese Seko of Zaire, now known as the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC). I am very moved to write you this letter. Given my current situation and situation, this is confidential. My husband and I fled from the Democratic Republic of the Congo and our two sons James Kongolo and Nzanga to Abidjan, Cote d'Ivoire, where my family and I settled, and we later moved to Morro, where my husband later died of cancer. However, because of this situation, we decided to convert most of the billions of dollars my husband had deposited in Swiss banks and other countries into other forms to ensure security, because (Dr) the new head of state, Mr. Laurent Kabila, has reached an agreement with the Swiss government and other European countries to freeze all wealth deposited by my late husband in some European countries. So my children and I decided to study the situation quietly in Africa until it improved. Just like now, President Kabila is dead and his son takes over (Joseph Kabila). My late husband's castle in southern France was confiscated by the French government, so I had to change my identity so my investments would not be traced and confiscated. I have deposited $18 million ($180 billion). Cooperate with security companies for safety reasons. What I want you to do is show your interest and that you can help us receive the money in our name so that I can introduce you to my son (Kongolo) who has the means to claim the above funds. I want you to help invest the money, but I don't want my cover to be exposed. I also want to buy real estate and shares in multinational companies and make other safe and non-speculative investments at your own advice. At this point, I want to emphasize the high degree of confidentiality required by this upcoming project, and hope that you will not betray my trust and confidence in you. Finally, if you want to help us, my son (Kongolo) will disclose all briefings to you about the project, tell you about the current state of maintenance of funds, and discuss your remuneration for services. To this end, please provide your contact information, i.e. your personal telephone and fax numbers, for verification, and use the above email address to confirm receipt of this email. Mrs. Mariam M.Seseko-Irish Linux User Group social event: social@linux.iehttp://www.linux.ie/mailman/listinfo/social Get (United Nations) subscription information. Body: 208. 亲爱的朋友，我是已故扎伊尔总统蒙博托·塞塞-塞科的遗孀塞塞-塞科夫人，现在被称为刚果民主共和国(刚果民主共和国)。我很感动能给你写这封信。考虑到我目前的情况和处境，这是保密的。我和我的丈夫以及我们的两个儿子James Kongolo和Nzanga一起从刚果民主共和国逃到科特迪瓦的阿比让，我和家人在那里定居，后来我们搬到莫罗科定居，我的丈夫后来在那里死于癌症。然而，由于这种情况，我们决定将我丈夫存放在瑞士银行和其他国家的数十亿美元中的大部分改为其他形式的资金，以确保安全，因为(Dr)新任国家元首洛朗·卡比拉先生已与瑞士政府和其他欧洲国家达成协议，冻结我已故丈夫在一些欧洲国家存放的所有财富。因此，我和我的孩子们决定在非洲低调地研究一下情况，直到情况好转。就像现在，卡比拉总统去世了，他的儿子接任(约瑟夫·卡比拉)。我已故丈夫在法国南部的一座城堡被法国政府没收，因此我不得不改变身份，这样我的投资就不会被追查和没收。我已经存入了1800万美元(1800亿美元)。为了安全起见与保安公司合作。我想要你做的是表明你的兴趣，你可以帮助我们以我们的名义收到这笔钱，这样我就可以把你介绍给我的儿子(Kongolo)，他有申领上述资金的方式。我希望你帮助投资这笔钱，但我不想让我的身份被暴露。我还想购买房地产和跨国公司的股票，并按照你自己的建议从事其他安全和非投机性的投资。在这一点上，我想强调这个即将到来的项目所要求的高度保密，并希望你不要辜负我对你的信任和信心。最后，如果你想帮助我们，我的儿子(Kongolo)将向你透露关于这个项目的所有简报，告诉你目前资金的维护情况，并讨论你的服务报酬。为此，请提供你的联系方式，即你的个人电话和传真号码，以供验证，并使用上述电子邮件地址确认收到本邮件。Mariam M.Seseko夫人--爱尔兰Linux用户组社交活动：social@linux.iehttp://www.linux.ie/mailman/listinfo/social获取(联合国)订阅信息。列表维护者：listmaster@linux.ie

text_translated: 208. Dear friends, I am Mrs. Sese Seko, widow of the late President Mobutu Sese Seko of Zaire, now known as the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC). I am very moved to write you this letter. Given my current situation and situation, this is confidential. My husband and I fled from the Democratic Republic of the Congo and our two sons James Kongolo and Nzanga to Abidjan, Cote d'Ivoire, where my family and I settled, and we later moved to Morro, where my husband later died of cancer. However, because of this situation, we decided to convert most of the billions of dollars my husband had deposited in Swiss banks and other countries into other forms to ensure security, because (Dr) the new head of state, Mr. Laurent Kabila, has reached an agreement with the Swiss government and other European countries to freeze all wealth deposited by my late husband in some European countries. So my children and I decided to study the situation quietly in Africa until it improved. Just like now, President Kabila is dead and his son takes over (Joseph Kabila). My late husband's castle in southern France was confiscated by the French government, so I had to change my identity so my investments would not be traced and confiscated. I have deposited $18 million ($180 billion). Cooperate with security companies for safety reasons. What I want you to do is show your interest and that you can help us receive the money in our name so that I can introduce you to my son (Kongolo) who has the means to claim the above funds. I want you to help invest the money, but I don't want my cover to be exposed. I also want to buy real estate and shares in multinational companies and make other safe and non-speculative investments at your own advice. At this point, I want to emphasize the high degree of confidentiality required by this upcoming project, and hope that you will not betray my trust and confidence in you. Finally, if you want to help us, my son (Kongolo) will disclose all briefings to you about the project, tell you about the current state of maintenance of funds, and discuss your remuneration for services. To this end, please provide your contact information, i.e. your personal telephone and fax numbers, for verification, and use the above email address to confirm receipt of this email. Mrs. Mariam M.Seseko-Irish Linux User Group social event: social@linux.iehttp://www.linux.ie/mailman/listinfo/social Get (United Nations) subscription information. List maintainer: listmaster@linux.ie

text: 209. 商会向我提出了紧急业务ASSISTANCE--------------------------------------Your联系的请求。之所以给我，是因为我的外交身份，因为我没有透露我寻求与你联系的实际原因。但我得到保证，如果你能提供帮助，你是有信誉的，值得信赖的。我是洛朗·姆佩蒂·卡比拉(Jnr)，洛朗·姆佩蒂·卡比拉总统的次子，洛朗·希望卡比拉总统是刚果民主共和国在非洲的直接前总统，2001年1月16日星期二，卡比拉在他的卧室里被他的私人保镖杀害。我有幸被我父亲的同事委托立即寻求您的紧急合作，将2500万美元(2500万美元)和数千克拉的钻石存入您的银行账户。这些钱和宝藏存放在欧洲和南非的一家安保公司的金库里。钻石和资金来源2000年8月，我的父亲作为国防部长和总统与他的内阁和陆军总司令举行了一次会议，讨论2000-2001年间7亿美元的国防预算。所以他执导了他最好的朋友之一。Frederic Kibasa Maliba是矿业部部长，也是被称为联盟圣战者联盟的政党领袖，他于2001年1月5日以2亿美元购买武器，我的父亲被谋杀了。FK.Maliba(FKM)和我已经决定把这笔钱留给一个外国人，之后他将用它来竞选政治选举。尽管如此，我们还是决定请贵公司将上述款项和钻石存入贵公司指定的账户。这笔交易应该在七(7)个工作日内完成，为了您的合作和伙伴关系，我们一致同意，当您成功地将资金存入您的账户时，您将有权获得5.5%的款项。贵公司的业务性质与这笔交易的成功执行无关，重要的是您的全面合作和承诺，以确保交易双方100%无风险，并保护参与交易的人员，即使在交易成功完成后，也要求严格保密。如果贵公司接受这一建议，请给我提供您的私人电话，并通过我的电子邮箱传真给我，以便立即开始交易。所有信件都是为了让我的律师注意：约瑟夫·爱德华。我指望你的荣誉为我保密，SECRET。期待你的紧急回复谢谢。最好的问候MPETI L.Kabila(Jnr)--爱尔兰Linux用户组社交活动：social@linux.iehttp://www.linux.ie/mailman/listinfo/social获取(联合国)订阅信息。列表维护者：Listmaster@linux.ie
text_translated: 209. The Chamber of Commerce submitted me a request for emergency business ASSISTANCE--------------------------------------------Your contact. It was given to me because of my diplomatic status and because I did not disclose the actual reasons why I sought to contact you. But I am assured that if you can help, you are trustworthy and trustworthy. I am Laurent Mbetti Kabila (Jnr), the second son of President Laurent Mbetti Kabila, the direct former president of the Democratic Republic of the Congo in Africa, killed in his bedroom by his personal bodyguard on Tuesday, January 16, 2001. I have the honor of being entrusted by my father's colleagues to seek your urgent cooperation immediately to deposit $25 million (US$25 million) and thousands of carats of diamonds into your bank account. The money and treasure were stored in the vaults of a security company in Europe and South Africa. Diamonds and funding sources In August 2000, my father, as Secretary of Defense and President, held a meeting with his cabinet and the Commander-in-Chief of the Army to discuss the $700 million defense budget for the period 2000-2001. So he directed one of his best friends. Frederic Kibasa Maliba, Minister of Mines and leader of the political party known as the Alliance Mujahideen Alliance, bought weapons for $200 million on January 5, 2001, and my father was murdered. FK.Maliba(FKM) and I have decided to leave the money to a foreigner, who will then use it to run for political elections. Despite this, we have decided to ask your company to deposit the above money and diamonds into the account designated by your company. This transaction should be completed within seven (7) business days and for the sake of your cooperation and partnership, we have unanimously agreed that when you successfully deposit funds into your account, you will be entitled to 5.5% of the payment. The nature of your company's business has nothing to do with the successful execution of this transaction. What is important is your full cooperation and commitment to ensure that both parties to the transaction are 100% risk-free and to protect those involved in the transaction. Strict confidentiality is required even after the transaction is successfully completed. If your company accepts this recommendation, please provide me with your personal phone number and fax it to me via my email so that you can start trading immediately. All letters were for the attention of my lawyer: Joseph Edwards. I count on your honor to keep it secret, SECRET. Looking forward to your urgent reply. Thank you. Best greetings to MPETI L.Kabila(Jnr)-Irish Linux User Group social event: social@linux.iehttp://www.linux.ie/mailman/listinfo/social Get (United Nations) subscription information. List maintainer: Listmaster@linux.ie

But I am assured that if you can help, you are trustworthy and trustworthy. I am Laurent Mbetti Kabila (Jnr), the second son of President Laurent Mbetti Kabila, the direct former president of the Democratic Republic of the Congo in Africa, killed in his bedroom by his personal bodyguard on Tuesday, January 16, 2001. I have the honor of being entrusted by my father's colleagues to seek your urgent cooperation immediately to deposit $25 million (US$25 million) and thousands of carats of diamonds into your bank account. The money and treasure were stored in the vaults of a security company in Europe and South Africa. Diamonds and funding sources In August 2000, my father, as Secretary of Defense and President, held a meeting with his cabinet and the Commander-in-Chief of the Army to discuss the $700 million defense budget for the period 2000-2001. So he directed one of his best friends. Frederic Kibasa Maliba, Minister of Mines and leader of the political party known as the Alliance Mujahideen Alliance, bought weapons for $200 million on January 5, 2001, and my father was murdered. FK.Maliba(FKM) and I have decided to leave the money to a foreigner, who will then use it to run for political elections. Despite this, we have decided to ask your company to deposit the above money and diamonds into the account designated by your company. This transaction should be completed within seven (7) business days and for the sake of your cooperation and partnership, we have unanimously agreed that when you successfully deposit funds into your account, you will be entitled to 5.5% of the payment. The nature of your company's business has nothing to do with the successful execution of this transaction. What is important is your full cooperation and commitment to ensure that both parties to the transaction are 100% risk-free and to protect those involved in the transaction. Strict confidentiality is required even after the transaction is successfully completed. If your company accepts this recommendation, please provide me with your personal phone number and fax it to me via my email so that you can start trading immediately. All letters were for the attention of my lawyer: Joseph Edwards. I count on your honor to keep it secret, SECRET. Looking forward to your urgent reply. Thank you. Best greetings to MPETI L.Kabila(Jnr)-Irish Linux User Group social event: social@linux.iehttp://www.linux.ie/mailman/listinfo/social Get (United Nations) subscription information. text: 216. 尼日利亚电力局联邦秘书处Ikoyi-Lagos。来自：George Osawai是国家电力局(NEPA)合同审查委员会主席。虽然这个建议可能会让你大吃一惊，因为它来自一个你以前不认识或从未见过的人，但在与我的同事们进行了适当的商议后，我决定根据直觉与你联系。我们恳请您的谦逊和保密的协助，接管7100万，50万美元。这笔金额(7150万美元)是一笔超额发票合同金额，目前在尼日利亚中央银行的离岸付款账户中，作为一项无人认领的合同权利，可以很容易地提取或起草，或支付给我的委员会建议的任何受益人。在这张纸条上，您将被呈现为国家环境政策法的承包商，已经执行了上述金额的合同，但尚未支付。建议的分享模式(%)：我和我的同事的比例为1.70%。2.你作为我们的合作伙伴/代言人，20%。我们的法律禁止公务员开设外国账户，因此我们正在与您联系。如果您对这项建议感到满意，请尽快提供以下信息：1.您希望作为基金受益人的姓名。2.您的保密电话和传真号码。进一步的讨论将集中在如何转移这笔资金以及如何实现我们这个伟大的机会的全部细节上。谢谢你们和上帝的祝福。最好的问候，George Osawa--爱尔兰Linux用户组：ilug@linux.iehttp://www.linux.ie/mailman/listinfo/ilug获取(联合国)订阅信息。
text_translated: 216. Ikoyi-Lagos, Federal Secretariat, Nigeria Electricity Authority. From: George Osawai is Chairman of the Contract Review Committee of the National Electricity Administration (NEPA). Although this advice may surprise you because it comes from someone you don't know or have never met before, after appropriate deliberation with my colleagues, I decided to contact you based on my intuition. We ask for your humble and confidential assistance to take over $71 million, 500,000. This amount (US$71.5 million) is an over-invoiced contract amount currently in the offshore payment account of the Central Bank of Nigeria as an unclaimed contractual right that can be easily withdrawn or drafted, or paid to any beneficiary recommended by my committee. On this note, you will be presented as a contractor under the National Environmental Policy Act who has executed a contract for the above amount but has not yet paid. Recommended sharing model (%): The ratio between me and my colleagues is 1.70%. 2. You as our partner/spokesperson, 20%. Our law prohibits civil servants from opening foreign accounts, so we are contacting you. If you are satisfied with this recommendation, please provide the following information as soon as possible: 1. The name of the beneficiary you wish to be. 2. Your confidential telephone and fax numbers. Further discussions will focus on the full details of how to move this money and how to realize our great opportunity. Thank you and God for your blessings. Best greetings, George Osawa-Irish Linux User Group: ilug@linux.iehttp://www.linux.ie/mailman/listinfo/ilug Get (United Nations) subscription information.

text_translated: 217. Dear user, have you ever thought that you can easily call people you know in other countries for 85% less than a standard phone price? Then save on those fees without subscribing to any low-cost calling services?! We now have a product that can do this! You can now call people from the world's most popular destination for just 33 cents a minute! There are no hidden fees, you don't need to register, use any credit cards, and pay any additional bills! To use this new service, you just need to call our access number 1530 927 055, and when connected, call the actual international number you want to call. For more information and a current list of countries/regions you can call, please check our website at http://www.ireland.pd-dial.com/Example: If you want to call the German number 0567 123 124, you can: 1) dial 1)530 927 0552) wait until you connect to our system and you will hear a message asking you to call the number you want to call. 3)Call the full international number starting at 00. In this case, 00(international)49(German country code)567 123 124(their numbers do not have an initial zero), you only pay 33 cents per minute to access our system, and any calls you make will no longer be charged! You can also use this service to make international calls from your mobile phone! However, if you are not sure, please check your mobile phone for the cost of calling the 1530 number. You only need to pay the fee for calling our access number, which will appear on your normal bill. However, any international calls you make will not appear on your bill, so you only pay 33 cents per minute when using our services! If you are making the call from a mobile phone, make sure you do not press the green/send button after dialing the actual mobile number, otherwise your mobile operator will charge you for the second call. If you have any questions or would like to contact us for more information, please check our website at http://www.ireland.pd-dial.com/for more information. If you are not interested in reducing your phone bill and do not want to know about any other similar offers we offer, please reply to this email using the word "unsubscribe" in the subject title. If your email has been forwarded, make sure you unsubscribe from the email sent to your actual account. We apologize if this message has caused any inconvenience to you.
